rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"X-RateLimit-Reset header uses `(Date.now() + retryAfterMs) / 1000` which computes an absolute Unix timestamp that drifts — use a stable reset time computed at response time, not derived from Date.now(","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Always verify newly exported helpers (like `byApiKey`) are covered by tests before merging; untested exports are easy to miss in diff review.","scope":"src/middleware/rateLimit.test.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Middleware uses a factory pattern: `createXxxMiddleware()` returning a handler, with a paired `XxxConfig` interface and X-RateLimit-* + 429+Retry-After response shape.","scope":"src/middleware"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Test files use `describe/it/expect/vi`, `afterEach` with `vi.useRealTimers()`, a `NextRequest` factory helper, and call `limiter.destroy()` for cleanup.","scope":"*.test.ts"}]}
